tagline: Dependable Pool Cleaning Experts — Quick, Reliable Service

hero.headline: 23 Years Keeping Jupiter Pools Crystal Clear
hero.subheadline: You bought a pool to relax, not to spend every weekend testing chemicals and scrubbing tile. Blue Safari Pools handles the cleaning, balancing, and repairs so your only job is to enjoy the water.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> One Trusted Team
services.subtitle: From weekly cleaning to emergency repairs, Blue Safari Pools has kept Palm Beach County pools swim-ready since 2003. One call handles it all.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Skimmer baskets, surface skimming, wall brushing, vacuuming, and full equipment checks every single week. Your pool stays pristine without you lifting a finger.

cards.title: Chemical Testing & Balancing
cards.description: Weekly chlorine and pH testing with monthly alkalinity checks. We handle sanitization, acid adjustments, and salt levels for saltwater systems.

cards.title: Algae Treatment & Recovery
cards.description: Green algae treatment is included free for regular maintenance customers. We also tackle yellow, pink, brown, and black algae with targeted solutions.

cards.title: Pool Equipment Repair
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, and automation systems diagnosed and repaired by experienced technicians. Most issues resolved in a single visit.

cards.title: Saltwater Pool Care
cards.description: Specialized maintenance for saltwater systems including salt level monitoring, cell inspection, and chemical balancing tailored to your setup.

cards.title: Seasonal Deep Clean
cards.description: Thorough tile scrubbing, filter deep-cleaning, and equipment tune-ups to prepare your pool for heavy-use season or bring it back after months of neglect.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Assessment
steps.description: Call or fill out our form. Bright will personally evaluate your pool, discuss your needs, and provide a straightforward quote — no pressure, no contracts.

steps.title: We Take It From Here
steps.description: Our experienced crew arrives on your scheduled day every week. Cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks — everything is handled so you never have to think about it.

steps.title: Dive In and Relax
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready year-round. If anything ever looks off, we come back and make it right at no extra charge.

about.label: Why Palm Beach Trusts Blue Safari
about.headline: Owner-Operated Since 2003 — That Makes All the Difference
about.description: When Bright Johnson founded Blue Safari Pools in 2003, he made a simple promise: treat every pool like it is his own. Twenty-three years later, that promise still drives every service visit. As an owner-operated company, Bright personally oversees your pool care, ensuring consistent quality that big franchises simply cannot match. We have built our reputation one backyard at a time across Jupiter, Palm Beach Gardens, North Palm Beach, and Tequesta.

features.title: Owner On Every Account
features.description: Bright Johnson personally manages your pool care. You will always know who is responsible for your service.

features.title: Free Green Algae Treatment
features.description: Regular maintenance customers get green algae treatment at no additional cost. We stand behind our work.

features.title: No Contracts, No Surprises
features.description: We earn your loyalty every visit. No long-term commitments, no cancellation fees — just reliable service week after week.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. Zero Hidden Fees.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the service level that fits your pool. Adjust or cancel anytime — no contracts, no penalties.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If your pool is not sparkling clean after any service visit, call us and we will come back the same week to make it right — completely free. We have upheld this promise for 23 years because we know our work speaks for itself. Your satisfaction is not negotiable.

faqs.question: How quickly can Blue Safari start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new customers are on the schedule within 3-5 business days. For green pool emergencies, we can often respond within 24-48 hours. Call Bright directly and we will work around your schedule.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during the cleaning?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our Jupiter and Palm Beach Gardens clients give us gate access and go about their day. After each visit, you will know exactly what was done and the condition of your pool.

faqs.question: Is green algae treatment really free?
faqs.answer: Yes. If you are on our regular weekly maintenance plan and green algae appears, we treat it at no additional charge. It is part of our commitment to keeping your pool swim-ready at all times.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Jupiter, North Palm Beach, Palm Beach Gardens, Tequesta, Ibis Country Club, and surrounding Palm Beach County communities. If you are nearby, give us a call — we likely cover your area.

faqs.question: Do you work with saltwater pools?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Saltwater pools require specialized care, and we have maintained hundreds of them. We monitor salt levels, inspect cells, and balance chemicals specifically for saltwater systems.

testimonials.name: Michael R.
testimonials.text: Blue Safari Pools has been cleaning our pool for years and they never disappoint. Bright is always responsive and our pool looks amazing every single week. Highly recommend their service to anyone in Jupiter.

testimonials.name: Sandra T.
testimonials.text: We switched to Blue Safari after a bad experience with another company. The difference was night and day. Professional, on time, and our pool has never been cleaner. Worth every penny.

testimonials.name: David K.
testimonials.text: Great service and fair pricing. They handled a green algae problem at no extra charge since we were already on their regular maintenance plan. Very honest and reliable company.
